descriptionEn: OpenAI details its response to the TanStack "Mini Shai-Hulud" supply chain attack, outlines the security measures taken to protect systems and signing certificates, and explains why macOS users must update OpenAI applications by June 12, 2026.

title: 机器人领域的 OpenAI 时刻？
description: 从叠衣服到煮咖啡，从实验室数据收集到现实世界的空间部署——物理智能正处于机器人技术的历史性转折点。
titleZh: 机器人领域的 OpenAI 时刻？
titleEn: The OpenAI moment in robotics? This company wants to install a "universal brain" for robots
descriptionZh: 从叠衣服到煮咖啡，从实验室数据收集到现实世界的空间部署——物理智能正处于机器人技术的历史性转折点。
descriptionEn: From folding laundry to making coffee, from lab data collection to real-world space deployment—Physical Intelligence is standing at a historic turning point in robotics.

title: 开普勒前CEO重新出发，Sota Infinite押注“机器人大脑”走向全球

descriptionEn: Sota Infinite will showcase its full brain capabilities this summer, including world models, multimodal VLA, and the Physica-Claw robot operating system, and will run through the entire early commercial scenario in the lab.
